caption: A woman with dark hair and glasses is speaking against a plain black background. She is wearing a light green, long-sleeved tunic featuring a decorative embroidered neckline with small red and blue details and a simple black necklace. A small lapel microphone is clipped to the center of her neckline. Throughout the sequence, she remains centered in the frame, her expression shifting as she speaks, with her mouth opening and closing. In the bottom left and bottom right corners of the scene, the "NPTEL" logo is visible, accompanied by a small circular graphic. The background and her attire remain consistent across the duration of the clip, with the only changes being the subtle movements of her facial expressions and head posture as she delivers her presentation.
